message:
feat(pages): Enhance HTML export with archive config and crypto worker

Comprehensive updates to the pages/export module and JavaScript assets:

src/pages/archive_config.rs:
- Added archive configuration parsing
- Support for unencrypted bundles
- Config validation and defaults
- Source metadata handling

src/pages/export.rs:
- Enhanced self-contained HTML generation
- Improved encryption integration
- Better resource inlining for offline viewing
- Progressive enhancement for CDN resources

src/pages/verify.rs:
- Added bundle verification utilities
- Checksum validation
- Schema version checking

src/pages/wizard.rs:
- Enhanced export wizard flow
- Better password handling
- Improved progress reporting
- Theme selection support

src/pages_assets/auth.js:
- Improved password flow UX
- Better error messaging
- Web Crypto API integration
- Session storage for decryption keys

src/pages_assets/crypto_worker.js:
- Non-blocking encryption via Web Worker
- Progress callbacks for large exports
- Memory-efficient streaming encryption

src/pages_assets/search.js:
- Enhanced full-text search in exported HTML
- IndexedDB persistence
- Better highlighting of matches

src/pages_assets/viewer.js:
- Minor viewer improvements
- Better message rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
